creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-01-09 23:19:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/glpi-plugins-tracker-server Makefile distinfo 
                                         pkg-descr pkg-message 
                                         pkg-plist 
  Log:
  glpi-tracker-server in a plugin for glpi witch make inventory of
  devices by SNMP and get informations like serial number, name,
  cartridge and page counter of printers and on switchs, devices connected
  on each port.
  
  PR:             ports/140158
  Submitted by:   ddurieux <d.durieux at siprossii.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.209     +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/net-mgmt/glpi-plugins-tracker-server/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-mgmt/glpi-plugins-tracker-server/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/net-mgmt/glpi-plugins-tracker-server/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/net-mgmt/glpi-plugins-tracker-server/pkg-message (new)
  1.1       +175 -0    ports/net-mgmt/glpi-plugins-tracker-server/pkg-plist (new)
